_note: Final s per Loth 1866: single continuous stroke with TWO kringels. Top kringel = the round-S body crossing itself near midband. Bottom kringel = a descender curl below baseline that loops back on itself before the pen lifts. There is NO forward coupling — final position only — so the renderer hides the 'out' marker; the exit field stores the terminus point for the visualisation but the connection engine ignores it.
